alerts.source: Utah DABS Product Locator DataTables API
alerts.inventorySemantics: Utah Product Locator exposes statewide storeQty/warehouseQty aggregates by SKU. Useful availability pressure, not per-store shelf inventory.
alerts.reason: Changed signal for Elijah Craig 1789 Small Batch Bour 750ML in UT: quantity: 1177 → 1176.
alerts.evidence: Utah DABS API row: storeQty=1176, warehouseQty=3288, status=1 General Distribution.

alerts.bottle: Concord ABC Board official lottery / raffle page
alerts.source: NC board release watch - Concord ABC Board
alerts.inventorySemantics: NC is fragmented by local ABC boards. Wake can expose store-level inventory, NC Stock Shipped Data gives board-level shipment evidence, and the NC warehouse page is statewide early-warning radar. Board/warehouse signals are useful planning intelligence but must not be described as exact shelf inventory.
alerts.reason: Previously seen signal for Concord ABC Board official lottery / raffle page in NC is absent from current run.
alerts.evidence: Concord ABC Board exposes an official lottery / raffle page at https://concordabcboard.com/preparing-for-bourbon-lottery/. Bourbon Signal treats this as a release-watch source surface; users should verify current rules and dates at the source.

alerts.source: ABS Store Inventory and Sale Items open data
alerts.inventorySemantics: Montgomery ABS product search/postback exposes county product rows and HAL/allocated flags. Store-level modal rows remain separate and should only alert as store inventory when extracted.
alerts.reason: Changed signal for Woodford Reserve Batch Proof in MD-MONTGOMERY: price: 21.99 → 3.49.

alerts.inventorySemantics: Tennessee ABC official public surfaces expose public information/forms and license lists for a private retail market. Treat as source-discovery/license intelligence only; do not produce bottle/store alerts from these sources.
alerts.reason: New statewide_catalog catalog_surface_signal signal for unknown bottle in TN.
